zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie del Vasto De Saluzzo於1190年出生在義大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左時，她的父親Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo45歲，母親Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato30歲。她和Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Ceva至少有2個兒子。她去世於1260年在她的家鄉享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie del Vasto De Saluzzo于1190年出生在意大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左时，她的父亲Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo45岁，母亲Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato30岁。她和Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Ceva至少有2个儿子。她去世于1260年在她的家乡享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: del
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Lorraine): variant of the habitational name Delle 2 or a masculine form of a homonymous topographic name. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Spanish or Italian preposition with fused definite article del ‘of the’, which forms first part of surnames such as Del Cid and Del Signore , has apparently been in some instances counted as an independent surname.

variants.name: Delle
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so named in North Rhine-Westphalia or a topographic name (see   Dell  ).

French (Lorraine): habitational name from Delle, a place in Territoire de Belfort. Alternatively, a topographic name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone who lived near a prominent alder tree or trees, from elle, a derivative of Middle High German erle ‘alder’.

nameMeanings.name: Vasto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Reynaldo, Alejandro, Andres, Carlito, Humberto, Jaime, Javier, Lilia, Luiz, Luz.  Portuguese Guilherme.
Portuguese and Galician: habitational name from any of the places called Basto in Portugal, from basto ‘dense (wood)’. This surname is also found in southwestern Spain.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie del Vasto De Saluzzo was born in 1190, in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy, her father, Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo, was 45 and her mother, Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato, was 30. She had at least 2 sons with Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Ceva. She died in 1260, in her hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie del Vasto De Saluzzo est née en 1190, à Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie, son père, Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Ceva. Elle est décédée en 1260, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie del Vasto De Saluzzo 1190 in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo 45 und ihre Mutter Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato 30. Sie hatte mit Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Ceva mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1260 im Alter von 70 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie del Vasto De Saluzzo è nata il nel 1190 nel Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, sua padre, Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Ceva. Morì nel 1260, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie del Vasto De Saluzzoが1190年にイタリアピエモントクウネオサルズゾで生まれた時，父Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzoは45歳，母Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferratoは30歳であった。彼女はGuglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Cevaとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1260年に故郷で70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie del Vasto De Saluzzo(이)가 1190년 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 살루즈오에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Ceva(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1260년 그녀의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie del Vasto De Saluzzo nasceu em 1190, em Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália, seu pai, Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Ceva. Ela faleceu em 1260, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie del Vasto De Saluzzo родилась в 1190 г. в местности салуззо, кунео, пиемонт, Италия, её отцу по имени Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato, 30. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Ceva. Она умерла в 1260 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie del Vasto De Saluzzo nació en 1190, en Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, su papá, Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Ceva. Murió en 1260, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años.
